mapper.sql: id, collection_id, blood_type, blood_amount, expire_date, status, out_unit, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT blood_type, SUM(blood_amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM blood_stock WHERE blood_type = #{bloodType} AND status = '正常' AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY blood_type
SELECT FROM blood_stock WHERE DATEDIFF(expire_date, CURDATE()) <= #{days} AND status = '正常' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY expire_date ASC

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, blood_type, SUM(blood_amount) as in_amount FROM blood_stock WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND status IN ('正常', '临期', '已出库') AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(create_time), blood_type ORDER BY date DESC

SELECT DATE(update_time) as date, blood_type, SUM(blood_amount) as out_amount FROM blood_stock WHERE status = '已出库' AND update_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(update_time), blood_type ORDER BY date DESC
